factors: If the farmer was already going towards the basket the wizard added an apple to, I picked that the wizard allowed the farmer to go because if the wizard would have added the apple to a different basket the farmer would have changed direction. When the wizard did nothing he had no effect on which way the farmer was going so I chose the last option and if the wizard added an apple to the opposite basket the farmer was heading towards I chose that the wizard caused the farmer to change directions but I was not sure if he was causing him or enabling him so I went back and forth for those situation.
feedback: I thought this was an interesting game and I am curious to find out what sentence was the correct one to pick.
